name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Here comes the Liberal Gun Grabbing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57158041:JJNdd9uAN:m:1:3206719985:0E3DC17344CDF5FEE0BAA3B750EB95A6:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene") Peter When I ran the ad above in my district, the liberals in DC clutched their pearls and headed to their fainting couches. They called me every name in the book because they had no idea how to handle a strong conservative woman. When I got here, they did everything they could to force me out of office, because they had a plan to take away your rights as an American and they knew I would NEVER let it happen. They failed, and when Joe Biden announced that our God-given rights were an "International Embarrassment," and he was going to start taking them away, **_I thanked God that I was still here in DC to fight him._** **[I will fight him with everything I have, but I need to know RIGHT NOW who is with me and who isn't. Will you stand with me against Joe Biden's Tyranny?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57158041:JJNdd9uAN:m:1:3206719985:0E3DC17344CDF5FEE0BAA3B750EB95A6:r "I will fight him with everything I have, but I need to know RIGHT
NOW who is with me and who isn’t. Will you stand with me against Joe Biden’s Tyranny?")** **Every time government leaders told you when you could leave your home, when you could send your children to school, when you could worship, every time they decided when you could and could not work -[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57158041:JJNdd9uAN:m:1:3206719985:0E3DC17344CDF5FEE0BAA3B750EB95A6:r "Shall NOT Be Infringed")** **ALL OF IT WAS LEADING TO THIS MOMENT.** This was always their goal - to defund the police and to take your right to defend yourself, then nobody could stand up to them. I'm still here and I'm still standing. **[I need you to stand with me.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57158041:JJNdd9uAN:m:1:3206719985:0E3DC17344CDF5FEE0BAA3B750EB95A6:r "I need you to stand with me.")** They know I am going to be a problem, and they are going to come after me. I need to be able to fight back, to fight for you. **[If you love this nation and refuse to permit the radical left to rule this nation, then I need you to continue to support my efforts in our fight for freedom.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57158041:JJNdd9uAN:m:1:3206719985:0E3DC17344CDF5FEE0BAA3B750EB95A6:r "If you love this nation and refuse to permit the radical left to rule this nation, then I need you to continue to support my efforts in our
fight for freedom.")** Together, we can stop this, but we need to start today, and I need you by my side! God Bless America,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57158041:JJNdd9uAN:m:1:3206719985:0E3DC17344CDF5FEE0BAA3B750EB95A6:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) P.S. Please remember that the same people seeking to take away your right to bear arms are the same people who side with Antifa and BLM. **[If you can see the writing on the wall, then join me in the fight to protect our Constitutional Rights with a gift of $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57158042:JJNdd9uAN:m:1:3206719985:0E3DC17344CDF5FEE0BAA3B750EB95A6:r "If you can see the writing on the wall, then join me in the fight to protect our Constitutional Rights with a gift of $50, $100, or even $1,000
TODAY!")**

name: Roger Misso
subject: Our big bet to win the 2022 midterm elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

With a tied Senate and razor-thin majority in the House, history tells us that the first midterm election for a new President is usually disastrous for their party.

Losing the House and Senate in 2022 wouldn't just be a political disaster. It would directly and immediately harm the lives of working families everywhere in America. [_**We cannot let this happen.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/6b6YxsKX0LxNyQOYAYWv8TGps98e--RLErLGWLWIWZM=)

In order to achieve a different outcome in the 2022 midterm elections, we must do something historically different. We have to buck the trend of recent campaigning. Here at Taking the Hill, we know that we won't avoid a crushing midterm defeat with another TV ad buy, fundraising email, or witty social media post.

How will we win in 2022 when all the pundits and odds-makers tell us that we're shaping up to lose big?

Simple: [_one voter at a time._](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/6b6YxsKX0LxNyQOYAYWv8TGps98e--RLErLGWLWIWZM=)

Taking the Hill is betting big on a concept called **deep canvassing** this cycle. _**[Deep canvassing](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/6b6YxsKX0LxNyQOYAYWv8TGps98e--RLErLGWLWIWZM=)**_ is a time- and labor-intensive process that involves trained organizers and volunteers reaching out to persuadable Republican and Independent voters over a series of multiple conversations to move them from skeptics to solid supporters of Democratic candidates. At its core, deep canvassing is about building trust with voters through empathetic conversations guided by behavioral science techniques. We know that it works, too - [just check out this video from one of our endorsees from last cycle:](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/49SCkVT0fXHCR7Ujr_98PAAfIqgmc4Q52KeHnl_Zo-Y=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/49SCkVT0fXHCR7Ujr_98PAAfIqgmc4Q52KeHnl_Zo-Y=)

[**Deep canvassing**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/6b6YxsKX0LxNyQOYAYWv8TGps98e--RLErLGWLWIWZM=) is the historic change that Democrats need to make in order to win in 2022. _But there 's a big reason why it could fail:_ the traditional relationship between political donors and political candidates is fundamentally flawed.

Because [**deep canvassing**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/6b6YxsKX0LxNyQOYAYWv8TGps98e--RLErLGWLWIWZM=) requires trained organizers, data infrastructure, and multiple, long conversations with individual voters, it takes time - and money. Campaigns typically target persuasion work like this for the summer months before their election - but they can rarely afford to execute a full persuasion campaign because the bulk of their money from political donors doesn't come in until after Labor Day. Take a look at this graph of when donors contributed to our candidates for the US Senate last year:

Data credit: [Alyssa Flowers](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/-iR2dz2_bIL58yn4FcXW2O4Bsg44r327YO-NYAP1Nv0=), Washington Post

This kind of fundraising model does not work, especially in the competitive races that will determine whether Mitch McConnell gets to become Senate Majority Leader again. To make history in these 2022 midterms, [**we need to reach and persuade _more_ voters _earlier_ in the cycle.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/6b6YxsKX0LxNyQOYAYWv8TGps98e--RLErLGWLWIWZM=) This will take an historic shift in both our voter contact and fundraising models. Here are two graphics: the first represents a conventional midterm election campaign while the second represents the only real path to a Democratic victory in 2022.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/6b6YxsKX0LxNyQOYAYWv8TGps98e--RLErLGWLWIWZM=)
[**_We can shock the world_ and prove the pundits wrong by leveraging deep canvassing**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/6b6YxsKX0LxNyQOYAYWv8TGps98e--RLErLGWLWIWZM=) to win the 2022 midterms voter-by-voter. But we cannot do this by doing what we've always done.

We are funding [**deep canvassing**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/6b6YxsKX0LxNyQOYAYWv8TGps98e--RLErLGWLWIWZM=) efforts in at least five key states with competitive U.S. Senate elections this cycle: [**Arizona, Florida, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, and Ohio.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/6b6YxsKX0LxNyQOYAYWv8TGps98e--RLErLGWLWIWZM=) We are committed to raising at least $100,000 for these efforts in each state for a total raise of $500,000. [_That 's more than we've ever raised before_](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/6b6YxsKX0LxNyQOYAYWv8TGps98e--RLErLGWLWIWZM=) \- but we need to do this to make victory possible in 2022.

[_**This is where you come in.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/6b6YxsKX0LxNyQOYAYWv8TGps98e--RLErLGWLWIWZM=) We can make history, turn the page on Trumpism in Congress, and establish a majority of integrity in the House and the Senate in 2022. But to do that, [_**we need you now more than we ever have before. Can you chip in as much as you can right now so that we can build our deep canvassing programs today? Together, we can change the course of history!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/6b6YxsKX0LxNyQOYAYWv8TGps98e--RLErLGWLWIWZM=)

I know this has been a long email, but I hope you'll agree that it is an important one. Bookmark this; feel free to share it and forward it with your friends. Encourage them to chip in as much as they can just as soon as they are able. We can win the midterm elections by betting big on [_**deep canvassing**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/6b6YxsKX0LxNyQOYAYWv8TGps98e--RLErLGWLWIWZM=) \- but our victory has to start right _now._

Yours in service,
Roger

Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/KIeQZMT4CXXEqgOHAyadaQ5cOtvIVdeS_5Aq2jkaqgc=)

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/1c_7MDU4b1O5a_B8KomSo5VU-ZUS3KO3frIK1orLRwU=/WgZiNQfLjeM5-QIXH1N__6Bo7XN5pr5X2FbMZLNmcNg=).
clean_body: Peter, With a tied Senate and razor-thin majority in the House, history tells us that the first midterm election for a new President is usually disastrous for their party. Losing the House and Senate in 2022 wouldn't just be a political disaster. It would directly and immediately harm the lives of working families everywhere in America. = In order to achieve a different outcome in the 2022 midterm elections, we must do something historically different. We have to buck the trend of recent campaigning. Here at Taking the Hill, we know that we won't avoid a crushing midterm defeat with another TV ad buy, fundraising email, or witty social media post. How will we win in 2022 when all the pundits and odds-makers tell us that we're shaping up to lose big? Simple: = Taking the Hill is betting big on a concept called deep canvassing this cycle. = is a time- and labor-intensive process that involves trained organizers and volunteers reaching out to persuadable Republican and Independent voters over a series of multiple conversations to move them from skeptics to solid supporters of Democratic candidates. At its core, deep canvassing is about building trust with voters through empathetic conversations guided by behavioral science techniques. We know that it works, too - = = = is the historic change that Democrats need to make in order to win in 2022. But there 's a big reason why it could fail: the traditional relationship between political donors and political candidates is fundamentally flawed. Because = requires trained organizers, data infrastructure, and multiple, long conversations with individual voters, it takes time - and money. Campaigns typically target persuasion work like this for the summer months before their election - but they can rarely afford to execute a full persuasion campaign because the bulk of their money from political donors doesn't come in until after Labor Day. Take a look at this graph of when donors contributed to our candidates for the US Senate last year: Data credit: =, Washington Post This kind of fundraising model does not work, especially in the competitive races that will determine whether Mitch McConnell gets to become Senate Majority Leader again. To make history in these 2022 midterms, = This will take an historic shift in both our voter contact and fundraising models. Here are two graphics: the first represents a conventional midterm election campaign while the second represents the only real path to a Democratic victory in 2022. = = to win the 2022 midterms voter-by-voter. But we cannot do this by doing what we've always done. We are funding = efforts in at least five key states with competitive U.S. Senate elections this cycle: = We are committed to raising at least $100,000 for these efforts in each state for a total raise of $500,000. = \- but we need to do this to make victory possible in 2022. = We can make history, turn the page on Trumpism in Congress, and establish a majority of integrity in the House and the Senate in 2022. But to do that, = I know this has been a long email, but I hope you'll agree that it is an important one. Bookmark this; feel free to share it and forward it with your friends. Encourage them to chip in as much as they can just as soon as they are able. We can win the midterm elections by betting big on = \- but our victory has to start right now. Yours in service, Roger Roger Misso Executive Director = = Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC Taking The Hill PAC PO Box 2134 Bristol PA 19007 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Today, I’m launching Policy is Personal PAC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
We will fight for candidates who fight for us.
#

For too long, our elected representatives have not looked like us, loved like us, sounded like us, or fought for us, because they don’t live like everyday Americans.
We must fight to elect a new generation of leaders who believe that policy must be personal for our nation’s leaders, and who will live that truth in the work that they do.
**Today, I am launching Policy Is Personal PAC, a new fundraising committee to support progressive candidates who come from underrepresented communities and who will pursue bold policy solutions to our nation’s greatest problems.**
**[Become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between the PAC and my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27611296/280621707/532281817?refcode2=69b1e054-719c-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210413-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWIxZTA1NC03MTljLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lo6jmD-oNHcx652JNGuEUagyACbajtjBRg7W29Ipp_U=)**
Policy is Personal PAC is founded on the core belief that we get better policy outcomes when we elect people whose lives and livelihoods are directly affected by the policies coming out of Washington.
We’ll endorse candidates who will stand up to make our democracy work for everyone — not just the privileged few — and who know what’s at stake if we fail to meet the urgency of this unprecedented time in our history.
And we’ll only support candidates who reject corporate PAC money, because we need more elected officials who are accountable to their communities and the values of working people.
**Your contributions to Policy is Personal PAC will stretch far to help fight back against big money and make our representative bodies truly reflective of the American people.**
**[Please help our PAC get off the ground by becoming a Founding Donor and splitting a donation between the PAC and my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27611297/280621708/532281817?refcode2=69b1e054-719c-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210413-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWIxZTA1NC03MTljLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lo6jmD-oNHcx652JNGuEUagyACbajtjBRg7W29Ipp_U=)**
Thank you for your support. Policy is Personal PAC will fight for candidates who fight for us. That’s how a democracy should be.
Onward,
Mondaire

clean_body: We will fight for candidates who fight for us. For too long, our elected representatives have not looked like us, loved like us, sounded like us, or fought for us, because they don’t live like everyday Americans. We must fight to elect a new generation of leaders who believe that policy must be personal for our nation’s leaders, and who will live that truth in the work that they do. Today, I am launching Policy Is Personal PAC, a new fundraising committee to support progressive candidates who come from underrepresented communities and who will pursue bold policy solutions to our nation’s greatest problems. = Policy is Personal PAC is founded on the core belief that we get better policy outcomes when we elect people whose lives and livelihoods are directly affected by the policies coming out of Washington. We’ll endorse candidates who will stand up to make our democracy work for everyone — not just the privileged few — and who know what’s at stake if we fail to meet the urgency of this unprecedented time in our history. And we’ll only support candidates who reject corporate PAC money, because we need more elected officials who are accountable to their communities and the values of working people. Your contributions to Policy is Personal PAC will stretch far to help fight back against big money and make our representative bodies truly reflective of the American people. = Thank you for your support. Policy is Personal PAC will fight for candidates who fight for us. That’s how a democracy should be. Onward, Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Friend, small businesses across America have closed their doors with no reopen date, which ultimately hurt our local economies and leaves so many hard working Americans unable to provide for their families. As a small business owner herself, Young Kim is passionate about providing small businesses the critical relief they need to survive. In fact, it's one of her top priorities, and she's already made huge waves in Congress to fix this issue.
But, Young wants to know if you feel the same way, so she asked us to reach out. We selected you from a pool of Republican supporters to give your feedback, Friend. | Friends,
We all saw this coming... Last week President Biden announced the **nomination of an****extremist gun control activist and lobbyist** to lead the ATF. And this is just the beginning. President Biden also announced an Executive order to **unilaterally create new gun control laws** that will restrict the 2nd Amendment rights of law abiding Americans. We know these actions are just the beginning, and that’s why New Hampshire needs to stand up and say NO! Last week, the New Hampshire Senate passed SB154, _"prohibiting the state from enforcing a Presidential Executive Order that restricts or regulates the right of the people to keep and bear arms."_ __

| |

name: John Burke
subject: This is what happens in one-party rule
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
Businesses are fleeing California for places like Texas. Read more >>
Peter, Are you **[following Kevin Faulconer on Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/335c59f42b6b35d4/5eae93d4ab5554e5c3d6b838967d376c/34943)**? If you are, you probably saw his tweet over the weekend, but I wanted to send you a quick email about it too. Companies are leaving California in record numbers for places like Austin, Texas, because it has become nearly impossible to do business here. **Please take a minute to[like and share Kevin’s tweet](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/335c59f42b6b35d4/230421d58a54a877c3d6b838967d376c/34943), and help get the word out that we CAN stop the mass exodus from the Golden State!** [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/335c59f42b6b35d4/9031d3224243fcdac3d6b838967d376c/34943) We need to STOP Gavin Newsom and his tax-happy ways before we lose every business in the state to Texas and other more economically friendly areas. The only way to do that is to VOTE HIM OUT. The recall election is getting closer every day, and we need to make sure we elect someone who actually knows how to grow business in California. Kevin Faulconer did it as Mayor of San Diego, and he’s ready to do it as your next governor of California. **Help us spread the word that there’s still hope for our great state — and it starts with getting Gavin out of office!** Thanks for your help,
John Burke, Communications Director | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/335c59f42b6b35d4/5e64d81f68fe096cc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/335c59f42b6b35d4/1500b39e7e940533c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/335c59f42b6b35d4/c2fd1dd83e1052d9c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Ben Zimmermann
subject: still fighting for health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project
body:
| Hi team -- we wanted to make sure you saw this message from Mike Espy. Real change is hard. Partisan politics continue to get in the way of making true progress. Twelve states, for example, have refused to expand Medicaid, playing political games instead of giving more people access to health care. Hi team, Mike Espy here.
When I ran for Senate last year, I ran to be the "health care senator” because I wanted to solve this problem once and for all. And I’m still committed to that fight.
In a minute, I’m going to ask you to **[make a donation to The Fairness Project, one of the most successful organizations across the country fighting for, and winning, campaigns to expand health care -- even when Donald Trump was president.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27618677/280648558/-1078230000?refcode=em1kicker_hc_restdonorsopeners_0413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTkyMmIxYS04NzljLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5lh4e2yEy3vO39kRdYHWv7ufrH-i1I6FzsNmol34F2Q=)** But first, let me tell you why this issue is so important to me, and how The Fairness Project has made real progress on it.
Mississippi is one of 12 states that has not expanded Medicaid, putting partisan politics over common sense. Our leaders are leaving money on the table that would go directly towards delivering care to those in need.
This is personal to me. My grandfather built the first hospital in Mississippi serving Black patients, in 1924.
And I’ve seen firsthand how health care is a racial justice issue. Over 130,000 Black Mississippians don’t have health insurance -- but would have access to care if we expanded Medicaid.
**But here’s the good news: my friends at The Fairness Project are making real progress on health care and other important issues for so many Americans.**
They’ve expanded Medicaid in 6 red and purple states by running people-powered ballot initiative campaigns that go around partisan politics and let the people decide for themselves.
_And they’re just getting started._
They’re looking into more campaigns to expand Medicaid, potentially including my home state of Mississippi, as well as other campaigns to raise wages, guarantee paid leave, and make real change directly at the ballot box.
**But they need our help. The special interests always spend BIG against them, and partisan politicians are already trying to silence the will of the people and make it harder to win these ballot initiative campaigns.**
**[Can you contribute to The Fairness Project to help them respond to the attacks and win more campaigns for health care across the country? They're truly one of my favorite progressive organizations out there today, so I hope you'll consider making a contribution.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27618678/280648559/-1078230000?refcode=em1kicker_hc_restdonorsopeners_0413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTkyMmIxYS04NzljLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5lh4e2yEy3vO39kRdYHWv7ufrH-i1I6FzsNmol34F2Q=) **
**[Contribute →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27618679/280648560/-1078230000?refcode=em1kicker_hc_restdonorsopeners_0413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTkyMmIxYS04NzljLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5lh4e2yEy3vO39kRdYHWv7ufrH-i1I6FzsNmol34F2Q=)**

According to some metrics, my home state of Mississippi is the least healthy state in the country.
Yet the politicians who are supposed to represent us have ignored the health of our neighbors. They’d rather play political games than help those in need.
That’s why I ran for the U.S. Senate and it’s why I’m still fighting for health care and justice for all.
**The Fairness Project is keeping up that fight too.** They're planning campaigns in 2021 and 2022 to make real change on health care and racial justice, regardless of who's in power.
They've seen firsthand how **when we let the people vote on issues directly, we can avoid the political games and bitter divides and make real change**.
**[And that’s why I’m proud to be supporting The Fairness Project, and I hope you’ll consider making a contribution to power their work: cutting through the partisan noise and winning ballot initiative campaigns to expand health care and change lives.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27618680/280648561/-1078230000?refcode=em1kicker_hc_restdonorsopeners_0413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTkyMmIxYS04NzljLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5lh4e2yEy3vO39kRdYHWv7ufrH-i1I6FzsNmol34F2Q=)**

Peter,
---
A slate of President Trump’s senior White House and campaign advisors have endorsed me for the U.S. Senate.
---
I am also honored to have Rudy Giuliani’s support.
---
But now there’s one person whose endorsement I’m seeking the most... __YOURS__.
---
My campaign is about empowering grassroots Americans like you, which is why I’m asking YOU to become a Founding Member of my Senate campaign.

clean_body: Let’s send a Navy SEAL to the Senate to fight for President Trump’s agenda. | Peter, A slate of President Trump’s senior White House and campaign advisors have endorsed me for the U.S. Senate. I am also honored to have Rudy Giuliani’s support. But now there’s one person whose endorsement I’m seeking the most... YOURS. My campaign is about empowering grassroots Americans like you, which is why I’m asking YOU to become a Founding Member of my Senate campaign. President Trump declared that he wants to rebuild the GOP next year with loyal conservatives in Congress who have the guts to fight for our America First agenda. As a Navy SEAL who deployed four times, I am ready and willing to fight for America once again. But with radical leftists and liberal RINOs in the swamp putting a target on my back, I need grassroots conservatives like YOU to help bring our campaign to victory. That’s why I hope you’ll accept your Founding Membership with my campaign today. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

Derek,

Here in Virginia, our governor just signed a landmark law expanding voting rights. Unfortunately, not every state is following our lead.

You've probably heard about the sweeping Georgia law that limits ballot drop boxes, makes oversight of elections more partisan, and prevents groups from giving food and water to people who are in line to vote. Now Texas is on the cusp of passing legislation that bans extended voting hours, closes polling locations in minority neighborhoods, and more. And 45 other states have introduced voter suppression legislation in 2021.

**Mark and this team are fighting back. The Forward Together PAC, which Mark created in 2006 to support Democratic candidates in Virginia and around the country, is working to fight voter suppression by electing Democratic Senators who support voting rights. Can you help by donating to the Forward Together PAC today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Voter suppression is wrong, and it doesn't just hurt the people in the states where it's passed. That's because who gets to vote in a state like Texas, or Georgia, or Arizona could determine the outcome of a national election — like the next presidential election of 2024.

That's why it's essential that we move _quickly_ to stop voter suppression. In the Senate, Mark is working to pass voting rights legislation, including the _For the People Act_ , which would prohibit many state-level voter suppression policies. But this important work to protect voting rights would be in jeopardy if Democrats lose their Senate majority next year. **[Your gift will help us make sure that doesn’t happen.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27620052/280653758/638046768?refcode=ris_20210413_e_f_us_na_na_votersuppressnd__&refcode2=ask3&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODQ2MGI0Ny04ZDljLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PKB-dXtw-GFS0IcznqSJ4ASGFhmuOoGl31J3wIhLHIY=)**

Our democracy has been tested in unprecedented ways over the past few years, and we aren't out of the woods yet. It's critical that all of us pull together to make sure we stay true to the principle our country was founded on — one person, one vote.

**[Will you join us with a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27620054/280653766/638046768?refcode=ris_20210413_e_f_us_na_na_votersuppressnd__&refcode2=ask3&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODQ2MGI0Ny04ZDljLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PKB-dXtw-GFS0IcznqSJ4ASGFhmuOoGl31J3wIhLHIY=)**

Thanks,
Team Warner

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xMdREVausWQniLzUWvShyyW4h8kEBOJLA_7d11CE8e3pi6F9_JdKNdgvohbvKc49kwIK_T1wr7Q0f0bn1yU41Wh5HqGacAHvyMnYosS7EkkvNfK_4du2lnwO1uDDYvHX_P0fengEcok=&c=k2gJYLZe8HNDxxCMr70wMhou-J6n4sUqte5k_B5xNxbAVZWLgyyKMQ==&ch=QpboKZX5SyaDKQFa-wC1KMaLuEbo2iBAy0wdEDFJwuS_bIlTGNnfOQ==).

name: Steve Scalise
subject: I wanted to update you on my trip to our southern border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY LATTA FOR CONGRESS
body:
That's why it's so important for us to take back the House...we can't keep letting them call the shots.

Hello Friend,

I went down to our southern border with ten of my Republican colleagues to see with my own eyes the consequences of President Biden's disastrous immigration policies.

We met with professionals on the ground to discuss the overwhelming migrant surge, and the devastating national security, humanitarian, and health crisis we're now facing on our southern border.

****I 'll cut to the chase--this is a crisis of President Biden's own making, thanks to dangerous choices like stopping construction of The Wall.

Friend, I need your help to secure our borders ASAP.****

[**< <4x-Matching to Secure Our Southern Borders>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jwYyGYTrH6uYD097pEFycwHfzKUbfPoCKu6aUQ10Zp9ntvrTv4JG1BqCwdEBAWXVFp2hvOsXWabn3DgH8Y6y1gv7Vv_Q17H1IWvM1sqDYRkinu45WjAr_fV0aNPatq-uUGV8KR0Qmd1QZ7PqzYo9LCLz4DwOZI4oRw91I8S93rkqbpTvKIYo3CGMDP5l6U5fEJ0KcdT3RnGIwxr8U4kpR78M2dGO30R1kPAl3uX9g2DZVd7P_a3sZ8A44yWNoROJ9rduy0Vj9qxWpACHcaIbVK6PaEq09Tt9GEOs62hGGihAPVr1iWEix4cG0x8tu69UJ04Mi7ZNgtNL7O-chX5p4rGSS6w-bX2l-EKx41CqscsAFqQJkhI3YpEqmgHPebPrV-ykEyiviEIgTWz7YlmyLhP94otIFA42heyZqr0uM9BIPynpq6VR1CoXqTJulvnQ140X1QAsC5NeZuKsXCaCm1tHme4D7F4_&c=BwbVAVdjYF-qfyoNmAFwQT4gH8BJfXG5-qRZMfmIvUopq6INCfp3Pg==&ch=Qr1nKGBGSet_5sQXqsfhOoixlRTFIvLEr0OBDb377XfuDPPsRFZnTw==)
---

It's clear the Democratic party doesn't care about keeping our borders secure. That's why it's so important for us to take back the House...we can't keep letting them call the shots.

My Republican colleagues and I saw the crisis at our border firsthand. **[I 'm asking every patriot on this list to chip in $10 to help us FIX OUR BORDERS. Your contribution will be 4x matched by a group top conservative patriots!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jwYyGYTrH6uYD097pEFycwHfzKUbfPoCKu6aUQ10Zp9ntvrTv4JG1BqCwdEBAWXVFp2hvOsXWabn3DgH8Y6y1gv7Vv_Q17H1IWvM1sqDYRkinu45WjAr_fV0aNPatq-uUGV8KR0Qmd1QZ7PqzYo9LCLz4DwOZI4oRw91I8S93rkqbpTvKIYo3CGMDP5l6U5fEJ0KcdT3RnGIwxr8U4kpR78M2dGO30R1kPAl3uX9g2DZVd7P_a3sZ8A44yWNoROJ9rduy0Vj9qxWpACHcaIbVK6PaEq09Tt9GEOs62hGGihAPVr1iWEix4cG0x8tu69UJ04Mi7ZNgtNL7O-chX5p4rGSS6w-bX2l-EKx41CqscsAFqQJkhI3YpEqmgHPebPrV-ykEyiviEIgTWz7YlmyLhP94otIFA42heyZqr0uM9BIPynpq6VR1CoXqTJulvnQ140X1QAsC5NeZuKsXCaCm1tHme4D7F4_&c=BwbVAVdjYF-qfyoNmAFwQT4gH8BJfXG5-qRZMfmIvUopq6INCfp3Pg==&ch=Qr1nKGBGSet_5sQXqsfhOoixlRTFIvLEr0OBDb377XfuDPPsRFZnTw==)**

[**Can I count on your support, Friend?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jwYyGYTrH6uYD097pEFycwHfzKUbfPoCKu6aUQ10Zp9ntvrTv4JG1BqCwdEBAWXVFp2hvOsXWabn3DgH8Y6y1gv7Vv_Q17H1IWvM1sqDYRkinu45WjAr_fV0aNPatq-uUGV8KR0Qmd1QZ7PqzYo9LCLz4DwOZI4oRw91I8S93rkqbpTvKIYo3CGMDP5l6U5fEJ0KcdT3RnGIwxr8U4kpR78M2dGO30R1kPAl3uX9g2DZVd7P_a3sZ8A44yWNoROJ9rduy0Vj9qxWpACHcaIbVK6PaEq09Tt9GEOs62hGGihAPVr1iWEix4cG0x8tu69UJ04Mi7ZNgtNL7O-chX5p4rGSS6w-bX2l-EKx41CqscsAFqQJkhI3YpEqmgHPebPrV-ykEyiviEIgTWz7YlmyLhP94otIFA42heyZqr0uM9BIPynpq6VR1CoXqTJulvnQ140X1QAsC5NeZuKsXCaCm1tHme4D7F4_&c=BwbVAVdjYF-qfyoNmAFwQT4gH8BJfXG5-qRZMfmIvUopq6INCfp3Pg==&ch=Qr1nKGBGSet_5sQXqsfhOoixlRTFIvLEr0OBDb377XfuDPPsRFZnTw==)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Toxic Censorship
body:
Remember that “Toxic Masculinity” ad by Gillette in 2019?
---
Last week I was banned on Stripe. Now, I’m having my videos pulled off YouTube!
| | | | Patriot,

[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/xg1KhuDM6eXqodZawZO78YZuE-0MwAJqI4hs0NSQJW1BjovtISQYAEJv1T5YgLYLoR7gop9Ytl70eTByXdtRkiRg9Hb-yVHG1SIUxipbQNuiFCb75cRkEbsj1jHamcmBDRvL3su5FZJj4qpnv7r5xNGcLQBAYDVtQD09Mid2LP6ilbJNV5YwgWVDxTF_Syja_2X9XqhEV41bRyZiNVoS6KQw6W1jHd-B4TY4hgl52E3CP3kYa8FJJIsfuPkF6Jml06LB_Kz6tqh_Qcn876bi0TtRDXBgmgmQV2gBCg) Remember that “Toxic Masculinity” ad by Gillette in 2019?

Rather than stay in their lane by selling and marketing grooming products for men, Gillette jumped headfirst into the #MeToo movement.

First, they ran “The Best Men Can Be” and despite the backlash, Gillette doubled down and ran an ad depicting a father teaching his transgender son how to shave for the first time.

After their failed attempt on the front lines of social justice, **the company posted $5 billion in losses**.

Their CEO, Gary Coombe, was unphased saying it was a “price worth paying.”

Gillette’s “Toxic Masculinity” campaign was done out in the open.

But what’s been done behind the scenes by companies like this is far worse and is the focus of my next lawsuit.

[**Help me keep up the fight by donating to my lawsuit to stop Cancel Culture.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/KegVOkm01p8t5HiExGXFdUkBbADVmT26xEN0kQ7DiOss8MbVjSzFRK6ytdmNZ2vXs7uBBEQDOb1XzYXgF29Ef8yiakp3n5wdsiCdtla1JoSZWAMI8ZXnHUR3iHuAvgdhDwC1_v7h8STVSBwul_gxtz-MHZJ7Mo5d7a0z1EleHhCMcSnKAXfXNsePabMkdbnijI7WgsNiIX4r2Om906LZdJt9-A9jbnmYpA3Ww5tR2zIsInV_tBhx9DoV9hpYDzdjuni7I94s_pqjJ-TgJYJ6X2i5XKLMurC2DUEJYw)

While Facebook, Twitter and Google have the power to cancel any of us at any time, they also work hand-in-hand with companies like Gillette that share their liberal agenda.

Big Tech’s advertisers hold MASSIVE sway on where their ads appear and if they don’t want one of their ads showing next to content you post . . . who do you think gets the boot?

You or the advertiser?

Yep, you’re gone in an instant.

My upcoming lawsuit will be exposing this relationship and proving how our culture . . . and our elections . . . are being manipulated by Big Tech AND the companies you support!

I guarantee that there are at least 10 products in your house made by companies that are part of a conspiracy to eliminate conservative speech.

[**Help me prove it by chipping in $20 to fund my next lawsuit.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/a2xW98zF37Vp9KiL2_P8lqboHBV3vrsp0ePqctGGeNLv3a2sd1FZDlnTwvj0DtLbw6w5fqQBbVnq9ViYGQpif3DrZoqL7CyzwDXe45CPJvEBV9WD2loUzaGwf8uEU40h2ZBMyuEVRXhveNq0nxfgW0BZnGQLLLSTszkwPP7KJA8ujW9uMFWrThHc87Z0CDuUHBXMO9HuJ6uPGahIDHN_oqBvpLQiR753F7gDRBVh98we00yweyEVGKNO6MwkgRdbVUR6uXQYxBNOBwMP-dO9gRexW6CkR4N8Qk4aKw)

And please, stay tuned because this will be huge.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---
© 2021 Illoominate Media
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/un/ExdPf4JK0lGo613oU7VHTbJ-mBPd2OI-obocKF-F7N80fv4gl84N684G-ph_NQNZh-jv345K_F8AJfIbc7owxPFPH7SC3x8VVqKgNXPnEdX2A_2hIcTjcIdnqduUz0k_JD11ZT-kR63vA1EN)

name: Rick Scott
subject: BREAKING: Trump awarded the Champion for Freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I met with President Trump yesterday and presented him with the Champion for Freedom Award for protecting the values that make America great, growing our economy, and defending freedom across the globe.

Friend,

I met with President Trump this week and presented him with the [_Champion for Freedom Award_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001N5W5cIXrc1A8cVK9Ol7iFZWNYDvuUPpH6rAy-HCwWbSbOUccdp6izjngO9nfnRMySvJobnzXc6hmHp6TJEgOsHUl1_uFcIRwoHWcYxrCdqPtmSXyhqCH3fyN21IUkVZEIp_T_fNBG6s1HGHD_PQCmICrG8ocwUXkNRHti6s89sKN5aeyDvyl7REIZi-qKna0mYiXParqhj4uuzws6gzxCrV5fyXdjTrSV-RmywBpuSYdkyblBy8OY_BGtUwmNsNwX1TkWw0OdZjaZs8YsbgvpMQA24l_xrr7QtudhfiOxUFdocrv0neDP3ODY5wZ5JfjM5m-QH3nwGaYaJdKqdEU1E2Ocmj2BrU2cH8QWrNhGGsQeN-k5oBmCKnCrQbTDmFLCZ2flsnqtgD7qo73F7SPOidp9t0BENvznIYYwMrvms0nGhmsy6ZtdSd5NG3dprd-&c=munWT-94lJbiQ-tA0drBiiMqu0z3BSCAhS7hSCe20x4RRf8twNalmg==&ch=yel6T1AeGpKPKqX10xuG791UTMjOL98k53H7_IwvIwvTuCfcpC_9hg==) for **protecting** the values that make AMERICA great, **growing** our economy, and **defending** freedom across the globe.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001N5W5cIXrc1A8cVK9Ol7iFZWNYDvuUPpH6rAy-HCwWbSbOUccdp6izjngO9nfnRMySvJobnzXc6hmHp6TJEgOsHUl1_uFcIRwoHWcYxrCdqPtmSXyhqCH3fyN21IUkVZEIp_T_fNBG6s1HGHD_PQCmICrG8ocwUXkNRHti6s89sKN5aeyDvyl7REIZi-qKna0mYiXParqhj4uuzws6gzxCrV5fyXdjTrSV-RmywBpuSYdkyblBy8OY_BGtUwmNsNwX1TkWw0OdZjaZs8YsbgvpMQA24l_xrr7QtudhfiOxUFdocrv0neDP3ODY5wZ5JfjM5m-QH3nwGaYaJdKqdEU1E2Ocmj2BrU2cH8QWrNhGGsQeN-k5oBmCKnCrQbTDmFLCZ2flsnqtgD7qo73F7SPOidp9t0BENvznIYYwMrvms0nGhmsy6ZtdSd5NG3dprd-&c=munWT-94lJbiQ-tA0drBiiMqu0z3BSCAhS7hSCe20x4RRf8twNalmg==&ch=yel6T1AeGpKPKqX10xuG791UTMjOL98k53H7_IwvIwvTuCfcpC_9hg==)

Donald Trump delivered for the American people by appointing three pro-Constitution judges to the Supreme Court, cutting taxes for middle-class families and job creators, and securing the border.

[**I want 5,000 Trump supporters to join me in congratulating President Trump for all he 's done for our country!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001N5W5cIXrc1A8cVK9Ol7iFZWNYDvuUPpH6rAy-HCwWbSbOUccdp6izjngO9nfnRMySvJobnzXc6hmHp6TJEgOsHUl1_uFcIRwoHWcYxrCdqPtmSXyhqCH3fyN21IUkVZEIp_T_fNBG6s1HGHD_PQCmICrG8ocwUXkNRHti6s89sKN5aeyDvyl7REIZi-qKna0mYiXParqhj4uuzws6gzxCrV5fyXdjTrSV-RmywBpuSYdkyblBy8OY_BGtUwmNsNwX1TkWw0OdZjaZs8YsbgvpMQA24l_xrr7QtudhfiOxUFdocrv0neDP3ODY5wZ5JfjM5m-QH3nwGaYaJdKqdEU1E2Ocmj2BrU2cH8QWrNhGGsQeN-k5oBmCKnCrQbTDmFLCZ2flsnqtgD7qo73F7SPOidp9t0BENvznIYYwMrvms0nGhmsy6ZtdSd5NG3dprd-&c=munWT-94lJbiQ-tA0drBiiMqu0z3BSCAhS7hSCe20x4RRf8twNalmg==&ch=yel6T1AeGpKPKqX10xuG791UTMjOL98k53H7_IwvIwvTuCfcpC_9hg==)

We need to hit our 5,000 person goal by midnight tonight!
**[**THANK TRUMP**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001N5W5cIXrc1A8cVK9Ol7iFZWNYDvuUPpH6rAy-HCwWbSbOUccdp6izjngO9nfnRMySvJobnzXc6hmHp6TJEgOsHUl1_uFcIRwoHWcYxrCdqPtmSXyhqCH3fyN21IUkVZEIp_T_fNBG6s1HGHD_PQCmICrG8ocwUXkNRHti6s89sKN5aeyDvyl7REIZi-qKna0mYiXParqhj4uuzws6gzxCrV5fyXdjTrSV-RmywBpuSYdkyblBy8OY_BGtUwmNsNwX1TkWw0OdZjaZs8YsbgvpMQA24l_xrr7QtudhfiOxUFdocrv0neDP3ODY5wZ5JfjM5m-QH3nwGaYaJdKqdEU1E2Ocmj2BrU2cH8QWrNhGGsQeN-k5oBmCKnCrQbTDmFLCZ2flsnqtgD7qo73F7SPOidp9t0BENvznIYYwMrvms0nGhmsy6ZtdSd5NG3dprd-&c=munWT-94lJbiQ-tA0drBiiMqu0z3BSCAhS7hSCe20x4RRf8twNalmg==&ch=yel6T1AeGpKPKqX10xuG791UTMjOL98k53H7_IwvIwvTuCfcpC_9hg==)**

If you appreciate everything Trump has done for our great Nation, join me in thanking Trump!

Sincerely,

Rick Scott

NRSC Chairman

body:

Democrats have built a campaign war chest filled with MILLIONS going into this next election cycle. We need to make sure our Conservative candidates have the resources to fight back and win! If we miss this goal, we risk being outraised and outspent AGAIN.
Friend,

**Our mid month fundraising deadline is quickly approaching and my team just informed me that we are WAY BEHIND.** [**Pledge to donate $35 to help us get back in front of the Democrats!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A4AQzBzaFOHjaf2kSZLrVqvateT0ez6Ts7EwhQ0zOTgfxWWEzo0yfNqJA1F76AvyQE1T-8LMhKeNvY4J4dptcJMWP8tdzM4ZcSAggLOXOAlURDRuNnYKKO9_pWbMCtu99fQmbo4MHLMM_j2oCPsv7LMIm7ZVE2U_GlEhLX4sWouYPmvAtv4Rn9oviKLflKCUCMdaw239hp0F0iFJxMg9G5IyG6HF2qmWmiIjg6M034G06QNJMQ_S-9VRCif5c1kWyZF0Rq5XHXYOIFY7C0PTt-j8mMUUt8tafNpyuLluIGKf7BYOFtiRPnb5GcPN2Gm4AqhihXdb7S39Wt7dduOLIiBYo6GKk2jpUckwSRoNOzET15fEzwOP0m-3ntzODrG5r3WFH0mDQ9SGtXKoNbie4oDF-Y18EDr0LarX3sGjdG1VkhUD_5ozEamGay0sMLN12N5BeBXiUzQ=&c=3-QoJqahxNRO-s-xpQt3bMm0y61LybkRawTRbw1KG6_5eoJvdtLkPg==&ch=EalihpoLyukCkw8vCPjCS0A0qr-fJcZOYbZkmSXDaK-efyfbyOajhw==)

****[DONATE TO'CANCEL' CANCEL CULTURE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A4AQzBzaFOHjaf2kSZLrVqvateT0ez6Ts7EwhQ0zOTgfxWWEzo0yfNqJA1F76AvyUoyNrUgzc1bC2KXvjO5nFku7O4pbwTmNk5qM_gKG_pS33W075uMyufJDwGt20Dlcu7vLG9H3SDe9tuEaILDeOh7qqSKhKHOPdjhhbcqgvIR-0cEP9Gfp_kaY0GevEfuuPx0MkC6_2EkMw0SDWqRyQxSXF6mprXRQt_jcSPNFTmPp7jA66vafnpeEW_X4gggWxtXAn2oUmjZjfT4bBBTZkoXD5Pb38K110EImWkf_gUetyiXt6TC9WBdpK6XVgbmBfqbJzbuOxYiW3YgVSmb24It30zZud4kPQfdr1xCJ32helh5VLGYaAkunAjIXumsi8nIvES6fV_RGPjNU40vz21bouRt4ky8GZxBchxyQ21rcHkaET5_CKQ==&c=3-QoJqahxNRO-s-xpQt3bMm0y61LybkRawTRbw1KG6_5eoJvdtLkPg==&ch=EalihpoLyukCkw8vCPjCS0A0qr-fJcZOYbZkmSXDaK-efyfbyOajhw==)****

Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi are moving swiftly to cancel the Constitution and YOUR freedoms. **They passed legislation to restrict YOUR 1st Amendment last month, and just this week, Joe Biden restricted your 2nd Amendment with an unconstitutional executive order.** [**Pledge to donate $35 to defend the Constitution and STOP BIDEN!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A4AQzBzaFOHjaf2kSZLrVqvateT0ez6Ts7EwhQ0zOTgfxWWEzo0yfNqJA1F76AvyQE1T-8LMhKeNvY4J4dptcJMWP8tdzM4ZcSAggLOXOAlURDRuNnYKKO9_pWbMCtu99fQmbo4MHLMM_j2oCPsv7LMIm7ZVE2U_GlEhLX4sWouYPmvAtv4Rn9oviKLflKCUCMdaw239hp0F0iFJxMg9G5IyG6HF2qmWmiIjg6M034G06QNJMQ_S-9VRCif5c1kWyZF0Rq5XHXYOIFY7C0PTt-j8mMUUt8tafNpyuLluIGKf7BYOFtiRPnb5GcPN2Gm4AqhihXdb7S39Wt7dduOLIiBYo6GKk2jpUckwSRoNOzET15fEzwOP0m-3ntzODrG5r3WFH0mDQ9SGtXKoNbie4oDF-Y18EDr0LarX3sGjdG1VkhUD_5ozEamGay0sMLN12N5BeBXiUzQ=&c=3-QoJqahxNRO-s-xpQt3bMm0y61LybkRawTRbw1KG6_5eoJvdtLkPg==&ch=EalihpoLyukCkw8vCPjCS0A0qr-fJcZOYbZkmSXDaK-efyfbyOajhw==)

If we miss this goal, we risk being outraised and outspent AGAIN. Friend, Our mid month fundraising deadline is quickly approaching and my team just informed me that we are WAY BEHIND. == Cancel culture tried and failed to cancel President Trump--cancel culture tired and failed to cancel me, but now the tides have changed and the Democrats have the upper hand. Joe Biden and the Democrats MASSIVELY outraised us this month and now that they have that upper hand, their next target is YOU! **== Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi are moving swiftly to cancel the Constitution and YOUR freedoms. They passed legislation to restrict YOUR 1st Amendment last month, and just this week, Joe Biden restricted your 2nd Amendment with an unconstitutional executive order. == Cancel culture won't stop unless YOU help us hit our goal. Now is the opportunity to change the tide and turn our ship around. subject: Will you vote in our Trump Poll today?

body:
My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we’re not seeing the results we were hoping for We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. Will you take a moment to cast yours now?

|

Peter,

Recently my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, **[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eda93bc89c4840fe9a546b0f8e201d30&_e=TzcEMGdBiAKvpoFlJJK3RRArw5cP_nP6PNT9wtYZoaMKmMf4SWvfy35JM_K7G3xoArwG1L8n6XmudYFTVdc3swRz300j1HPYSdJo7vVJ4jbZVz0iZdTmAljGBK1QYu1vgCgtHPwb68lnRw9Xzh4DSxs93drjtztsyvpPCbp_PSvl7DdUXID6w3d0pTlUVXYMKz-6NlpUYY04MC89WZcKJbH5mlE3KLB0YDDCEz06bqKHr0gTIwywwcfQIdTVP-s2SEIpiZtZzfS1e1TByNlo2mX5pdv82Sy-H36lUfzVGNs_vY0YXlgM51Fh8sQKZBRfwX9_YtemusSv8Mk71UzOC4R6tQoortjBK1dYypBsV6Ego0xTDXFc5Cap0brujiZgWls9ZUt7D46Bvw8L0vaJiRdK2S0eNLcAk7SfiWOzP7S037Z3m4RWAQLYiR1K9t2bZkeMVlYy1VcGqdxakN67ByjNg8QRyYz46-qzUdEGAXIVv2tb7DGq9vD9vegQHr5w)**

My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we’re not seeing the results we were hoping for. **We set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to vote in our poll - the more votes the more accurate the findings - and we’re coming up 1,000 votes short. **

Peter, your name is not on my list as having voted. **[Would you do me a personal favor and cast your vote in my poll before midnight tonight?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eda93bc89c4840fe9a546b0f8e201d30&_e=TzcEMGdBiAKvpoFlJJK3RRArw5cP_nP6PNT9wtYZoaMKmMf4SWvfy35JM_K7G3xoArwG1L8n6XmudYFTVdc3swRz300j1HPYSdJo7vVJ4jbZVz0iZdTmAljGBK1QYu1vgCgtHPwb68lnRw9Xzh4DSxs93drjtztsyvpPCbp_PSvl7DdUXID6w3d0pTlUVXYMKz-6NlpUYY04MC89WZcKJbH5mlE3KLB0YDDCEz06bqKHr0gTIwywwcfQIdTVP-s2SEIpiZtZzfS1e1TByNlo2m-30xW3sT-0tkRH--E6723_UIatR3jBc27_QdtxJ7nKyr88CDOGKwOHXiFYGVqlFPeD2iLGP_lOh7UTmE3WmblwpZvxPZTcNbAUl659hM_av5fTXwGFUSekVaSgdQvlte4mV0TG22IHiQkMU70efRpiGnI5u0OASgJkKY6s7vmUocroHt9RVni6n39ZCcfa6HsMmCcE8f01PBhko9UORxI_whv7VNQ7fD-e6VbuomVm)**

You see, the earlier we can determine the direction in which Republican voters want the party to go – and the leaders who voters want to be at the helm -- _**the sooner we can fine-tune our plans to help take back the House majority in next year’s midterm elections**_.

name: Giffords.org
subject: Add your name to dedicate a flower in our Gun Violence Memorial on the National Mall and join us in the fight to end gun violence!
body:
#

Friends,
Today, we're unveiling our Gun Violence Memorial on the National Mall in Washington, DC to remember victims of gun violence and to inspire the courage to act and save lives.
[](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee14d/78fba3aa/63e5e9a9/50aadd37/4003582343/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://main-respsol.bsd.net/page/signup/sponsor-a-flower-2021?source=em210413-1-full")
The 40,000 flowers that make up this installation represent the number of Americans who die from gun violence each year.
We know that gun violence is preventable. We know there are solutions. What we need now is for the Senate to summon the courage to act.
We hope that this installation will bring attention to the epidemic of gun violence in this country. We hope that it will force members of Congress to visually see the loss that is happening due to their inaction.
Now we just need your help to spread the message, and that starts by making your voice heard.
If you would like to get involved, you can add your name to dedicate a flower in this installation to someone and join us in the fight to end gun violence.
**[DEDICATE A FLOWER](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee14d/78fba3aa/63e5e9a9/50aadd37/4003582343/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://main-respsol.bsd.net/page/signup/sponsor-a-flower-2021?source=em210413-1-full")**
Nearly every American will know a victim of gun violence at some point in their lifetime. This installation will visualize that reality in a bold and unique way that refuses to be overlooked or ignored.
It'll be impossible to ignore the breadth and depth of a crisis when it takes up so much physical space, especially given its proximity to the halls of Congress.
This display will serve as a tribute to the many lives that have been lost to gun violence, a testament to the strength and courage of survivors, and a plea to our elected officials to pass universal background checks and other lifesaving gun safety legislation in the Senate.
Thank you so much for being a partner in this movement.
Team Giffords
**[DEDICATE A FLOWER](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee14d/78fba3aa/63e5e9a9/50aadd37/4003582343/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://main-respsol.bsd.net/page/signup/sponsor-a-flower-2021?source=em210413-1-full")**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee14d/78fba3aa/63e5e9a9/50aadd36/4003582343/VEsC/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

name: Ibraheem Samirah
subject: It's time for universal healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Samirah for Delegate
body:
Check out Episode #2 of my Check Up Series where we talk about healthcare!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27623357/280667560/-1282350553?refcode=em210301_launch1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGVlMjRkOS05YTljLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YMJG7on0rvdKdZ2M22Hii0ZrZ0kTssmcrf0JP2aMals=) Derek, As a doctor, I have seen my patients forced to choose between affording rent and paying for the medical services that they desperately need during this pandemic. Given my expertise as the only Doctor in the House of Delegates, I expected this. In fact, on the first declared day of the pandemic, I got up on the floor of the Virginia House and demanded a special session to address it, immediately. After a long and heated debate, the Governor agreed to it, and Virginia has been a leader in fighting this pandemic ever since. As important as our response was, we need to enact bold, progressive healthcare legislation to ensure that the Commonwealth is better equipped to care for our residents. Now, more than ever, we should be focused on enacting Universal Single-Payer Healthcare coverage. **If you want to hear more about my experience as the only Doctor in the House of Delegates and my solutions for how to better prepare Virginia for Universal Single-Payer Healthcare, check out Episode #2 of my Check Up Series by clicking on the thumbnail below!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27623358/280667561/1492824929?refcode=0413healthcare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGVlMjRkOS05YTljLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YMJG7on0rvdKdZ2M22Hii0ZrZ0kTssmcrf0JP2aMals=) As a Delegate, I know my job is to fight for what’s right in Richmond -- and with your help I can continue to do just that for years to come. Thank you in advance,
Del. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Urgent call to action: Watch Mr. Smith Goes to Washington on your own or with a group!
body:
| |
---
If you haven’t already signed up to watch _Mr. Smith Goes to Washington_ next week, either on your own, with your household, or with guests you invite over, it’s time to get signed up!

This call to action, to watch the iconic Jimmy Stewart film, is critically important right now, as the left are trying to get rid of the filibuster. The movie is a really fun, entertaining way to learn about and discuss the filibuster, and why the Senate must keep it in place.

We have a how-to guide available for those of you [that will be hosting house parties and inviting guests](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAzLTljOGUwNmVmMGRiMDQ0MDVhYTY3MjdiMDJlNWJhY2Zj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1Byb3RlY3RfRmlsaWJ1c3Rlcl9Ib3dfVG9fR3VpZGUucGRmP21pZD00MzYzMiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=vL0WyHH1_he26cfyULE7pw), and a guide for those of you [that are watching it on your own or with the members of your household](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAzLTljOGUwNmVmMGRiMDQ0MDVhYTY3MjdiMDJlNWJhY2Zj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1Byb3RlY3RfRmlsaWJ1c3Rlcl9Ib3dfVG9fR3VpZGVfRnJpZW5kc19GYW1pbHkucGRmP21pZD00MzYzMiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=5IDH1VCjcRrmOpP_AHUuwg).

**[Will you commit today](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAzLTljOGUwNmVmMGRiMDQ0MDVhYTY3MjdiMDJlNWJhY2Zj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZDRRVXByZEQzQWplbW9zTWwwZnFGdVFSNHNSVENONmV4eFJBOVYyeHc0a016RUF3L3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MzYzMiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=VKgB542QGJfploMjzX460g)** to watching _Mr. Smith Goes to Washington_ next week and taking action to keep the filibuster? Some of you are unable to have guests over to your houses right now, but there’s nothing stopping you from watching the movie on your own or with your family!

**[Sign up today](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAzLTljOGUwNmVmMGRiMDQ0MDVhYTY3MjdiMDJlNWJhY2Zj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZDRRVXByZEQzQWplbW9zTWwwZnFGdVFSNHNSVENONmV4eFJBOVYyeHc0a016RUF3L3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MzYzMiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Q97FlgGVc8GNpCG_owPbFw)** , and help us stop the left from getting rid of the filibuster and passing every radical, anti-American piece of legislation they’ve ever wanted to pass.
[JOIN THE FILIBUSTER DAY OF ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAzLTljOGUwNmVmMGRiMDQ0MDVhYTY3MjdiMDJlNWJhY2Zj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZDRRVXByZEQzQWplbW9zTWwwZnFGdVFSNHNSVENONmV4eFJBOVYyeHc0a016RUF3L3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MzYzMiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=lv3rbnFwi09_r2sWRUk9iw)
**HOW-TO GUIDES**
[HOUSE PARTY GUIDE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAzLTljOGUwNmVmMGRiMDQ0MDVhYTY3MjdiMDJlNWJhY2Zj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1Byb3RlY3RfRmlsaWJ1c3Rlcl9Ib3dfVG9fR3VpZGUucGRmP21pZD00MzYzMiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=_Oq-syf2h8D4X-nkajZxcg)
[FRIENDS & FAMILY GUIDE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAzLTljOGUwNmVmMGRiMDQ0MDVhYTY3MjdiMDJlNWJhY2Zj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1Byb3RlY3RfRmlsaWJ1c3Rlcl9Ib3dfVG9fR3VpZGVfRnJpZW5kc19GYW1pbHkucGRmP21pZD00MzYzMiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=r5X0CG9cKns4IFk2LVdMww)
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
|

We have a how-to guide available for those of you , and a guide for those of you . to watching Mr. Smith Goes to Washington next week and taking action to keep the filibuster? Some of you are unable to have guests over to your houses right now, but there’s nothing stopping you from watching the movie on your own or with your family! , and help us stop the left from getting rid of the filibuster and passing every radical, anti-American piece of legislation they’ve ever wanted to pass. HOW-TO GUIDES In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2021 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 |

name: Team AOC
subject: Funeral Assistance [Applications open]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Yesterday, applications opened to receive up to $9,000 in funeral assistance for those who lost a loved one to COVID-19.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210413-2003-header&t=1&akid=2003%2E2526796%2ECK73Kt)
Earlier this year, we shared the good news about a program that Alexandria fought for and won in Congress: Funeral assistance for families who’ve lost a loved one to COVID-19.
**Now, we’re excited to share that applications are _officially open_ to receive up to $9,000 to help cover the cost of laying a loved one to rest.**
The program is retroactive and will reimburse families who lost loved ones to the pandemic **as far back as January 20, 2020**. It is available to _everyone nationwide_ , no proof of need or financial hardship is required, and the deceased person can be documented or undocumented.
[**If you or someone you know is looking to apply, visit the FEMA website here to learn more about the needed documentation and then call 844-684-6333.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8521?t=2&akid=2003%2E2526796%2ECK73Kt)
**[Learn more](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8521?t=3&akid=2003%2E2526796%2ECK73Kt)**
Early in the pandemic, community leaders shared with us the disparate impact of COVID cases on our community and the devastating economic impact of funeral expenses.
Alexandria’s dad passed away when she was a teen and she had to arrange his services. The funeral expenses were part of the financial devastation, and she never wants anyone else to experience that. **So, working with Senator Schumer, she got to work right away to prioritize funeral assistance in the COVID relief bills.**
Through this measure, families won’t have to bear the incredible financial burden on top of the immeasurable loss they have endured. This will also help families who have suffered the financial burden of funeral costs over the last year get back on their feet.
**On the first day alone, over 1 million people called the funeral assistance hotline**. It’s overwhelming to know so many need this relief, but we’re glad that families who have lost so much are getting help.
[**Alexandria will continue advocating for policies like this that directly impact people’s lives. Please share the FEMA website here to help spread the word.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8521?t=4&akid=2003%2E2526796%2ECK73Kt)
Thinking of your loved ones.
Team AOC
**[Donate](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8522?refcode=em20210413-2003&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=2003%2E2526796%2ECK73Kt)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210413-2003-footer&t=6&refcode2=2003_2526796_CK73Kt&akid=2003%2E2526796%2ECK73Kt)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=2003%2E2526796%2ECK73Kt) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=2003%2E2526796%2ECK73Kt) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=2003%2E2526796%2ECK73Kt)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=10&akid=2003%2E2526796%2ECK73Kt)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=2003%2E2526796%2ECK73Kt). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support.
| | |
---
| "Sponsored Message"

| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ce0f981bccfc4ffa95563d2f1e7cdcf6&_e=eXI1kKz0v_sfdAngcJAhAF9_mtUvn7kCpA_p-693SkALMVKsoKd_4BK_MBo4lJjk3dy4gnCvbZs6lYl9nI3_r9FMBJyNi292NrWhdVYgMx9yOod5f1AKJJnBvXYVxT3iMgebcdS-ct1Pj1kHoN5JnYhxUYU0Tf7EERdXO1eTOPXKB0gyKwCim5dtvGMkrCl4qK8-uGKhZxbwYnr6ZMgZUvM6DvUomN3FPe9_-lZkZcotVA5DBgI7AEaeRuCv1aUCdVcsBBIbQDkBbBSqzM2VRjGan83Q6YzRXU0oEcZDjNGN_vOcRIQp1-MPB62LpQHkyfq_7-i7uAsGuC-V3kbnLwNES6xg2rjg6vMAHfsAouRw5FpziX7r08ZmhQXi7_UBxjlNQJur9rYw8UZ5cv5i_1yrL4foQKQnMu6zQG-YRpJ4ZtrTRPJ4OtmXBkItRUg-)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ce0f981bccfc4ffa95563d2f1e7cdcf6&_e=eXI1kKz0v_sfdAngcJAhAF9_mtUvn7kCpA_p-693SkALMVKsoKd_4BK_MBo4lJjk3dy4gnCvbZs6lYl9nI3_r9FMBJyNi292NrWhdVYgMx9yOod5f1AKJJnBvXYVxT3iMgebcdS-ct1Pj1kHoN5JnYhxUYU0Tf7EERdXO1eTOPXKB0gyKwCim5dtvGMkrCl4qK8-uGKhZxbwYnr6ZMgZUvM6DvUomN3FPe9_-lZkZcrDeYLIHUUyj2t9dSlk7X33EloIpIavdJH2-qWS2eTS3O7Ayfel_BZYp2w8NG6oAFpfYATie-ahepByHMB2JK2xHO5qbJI4AbFLkbTIFaqqPHayz2YUIzT9odzoZUvCCL4UCnQ_mbjwOYb6RbrGcM2ObpynuczI20F6GfnbcjewBVNsrMB8i2BJfM1g5_BtOB8nSehdVPMbSd8-te_vdmDp)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ce0f981bccfc4ffa95563d2f1e7cdcf6&_e=eXI1kKz0v_sfdAngcJAhAF9_mtUvn7kCpA_p-693SkALMVKsoKd_4BK_MBo4lJjk3dy4gnCvbZs6lYl9nI3_r9FMBJyNi292NrWhdVYgMx9yOod5f1AKJJnBvXYVxT3iMgebcdS-ct1Pj1kHoN5JnYhxUYU0Tf7EERdXO1eTOPXKB0gyKwCim5dtvGMkrCl4qK8-uGKhZxbwYnr6ZMgZUvM6DvUomN3FPe9_-lZkZcqeDY-fTyychgestXb5ft0IQUDz6OTKC4_P5tzwOQXvXxZ1HJ7k8vFAsS4oHvDHW7FKJh_qpy6rZwFrssXm8Sp4BGKnEZuHgTrLoOUZFeuKqyDaPTMaHLLui80tKRdnRkpaz5-T17IZYKbOy80Fln4--9RL9y2au57Va6kCu0UhiT01WzXos7m8RHW_r_phDhK0uLbu2V7d8zed5m4NJ7OQ)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

Peter ー right now is not the time to tune out politics.

That’s exactly what the Democrats are counting on...

Andrew is sounding the alarm against H.R. 1. Here’s a quick breakdown of why this bill is so reckless and why we can’t afford for it to pass:

**→ Creates Less Secure and Less Fair Elections**
**→ Gives the Federal Government Control Over State Elections**
**→ Provides Democrats A Permanent Advantage**

If this becomes law, it will completely alter our electoral system and give Nancy Pelosi and the radical Left unrestricted influence and power.
